parameters.query: SELECT document_id, client_id, document_uuid, original_filename, storage_path, mime_type, document_type, category, status, metadata FROM documents WHERE status = 'classified' ORDER BY priority DESC, received_at ASC LIMIT 15;

nodes.name: Extract with OCR
nodes.notes: Replace with actual Tesseract OCR execution

parameters.query: INSERT INTO document_extractions (document_id, client_id, extraction_type, status, result_data, confidence_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'completed', $4, $5, NOW(), NOW());
UPDATE documents SET status = 'extracted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $1;

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
